title: Security, audit and deployment hardening
goal: Ensure the CopilotKit pilot preserves existing authorization, confirmation, audit and deployment guarantees.
non_goals: Do not introduce new public external endpoints without auth review.
Do not log raw prompts or full actor context.
acceptance: User without object permission cannot open hidden object.
User without write permission cannot mutate object through CopilotKit.
Write actions require confirmation as before.
AG-UI events do not contain secrets, session cookies or raw PII.
